validationSource.description: Which harness produced the confidence fields, when, and against what golden window. Emitted automatically when validation runs.

validationNote.description: The validation definition in force (event set, matching rule, direction test).

skipped.description: Stations resolved but not fitted this run, with why — so coverage is auditable from the bundle alone. Absent when nothing was dropped.

floodDirection.description: Compass bearing of the flood axis, degrees true.

offset.description: Mean flow (Z0), knots, along the flood axis.

confidence.description: From out-of-sample validation. 'quarantine' means do not use.

validationMedianMin.description: Median extremum-timing error in minutes vs CHS wcp1-events (extrema only; the tier judges this).

validationSlackMedianMin.description: Median slack-timing error in minutes, reported separately -- never pooled into validationMedianMin.

trainingDays.description: Present in mixed-window bundles: the training window that validated better for this station.

contested.description: Hand annotation: independent harnesses disagreed on this station's tier. Not emitted by the pipeline; dropped on regeneration.
